'''''AGWS-04''''' was a [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]] [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] serving the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during her attempt to wrest power from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]].

==History==
During the [[Battle of Nocto]], both the ''AGWS-04'' and ''[[AGWS-03]]''—an identical Strike Cruiser—were waiting in line behind the ''[[Sagina]]'' at the [[Telgorn shipyard|shipyard]] ''[[Calenz]]''—the facility where the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam]] engineers planned to refit further vessels to carry a pair of [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projectors]], providing [[Interdictor/Legends|interdiction]] capabilities according to the [[Modified Strike Cruiser]] design pioneered by the [[Peregrine (Strike-class)|''Peregrine'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
